narrative.description: Exploiter compromises 5 of 9 validator nodes via spear-phishing and social engineering.
173,600 ETH and 25.5M USDC drained from Ronin Bridge contract in two transactions.
Funds moved through multiple 'Peeling Chains' to aggregate deposits into Tornado Cash.
Assets bridged to decentralized exchanges and converted to more stable pairings.

alerts.title: Multisig Threshold Violation
alerts.why: Unusual validator signature pattern detected outside of standard operational hours.

alerts.title: Aggregated Peeling Activity
alerts.why: Systematic 42-address chain detected moving exactly 100 ETH per hop.
